_comment: Skeleton template for F-A failure mode (subagent timeout). Copy this file to results/{id}_result.json with field substitution. Used when in-flight subagent exceeds 5min soft / 10min hard timeout without returning a verdict. See test-pc-worker/SKILL.md §Subagent Dispatch for failure mode handling.

result.status_detail: Subagent did not return verdict within timeout budget

notes: F-A subagent timeout (5min soft / 10min hard). Main session pushed skeleton TIMEOUT verdict to unblock pipeline. Manual re-verification required if accuracy critical.
